mapper.insert:
-- 批量插入咨询师排班数据 INSERT INTO counselor_schedule ( schedule_id, counselor_id, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, slot_duration, available_slots, schedule_type, reservation_location, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( UUID(), -- 自动生成UUID作为主键 #{userId}, #{scheduleDate.schedule_date}, #{time.startTime}, #{time.endTime}, #{time.slot_duration}, #{time.available_slots}, #{time.schedule_type}, #{time.reservationLocation}, #{time.status}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW() )

-- 插入预约信息 INSERT INTO consultation_appointment( appointment_id, student_id, schedule_id, appointment_type, consultation_mode, location, appointment_status, is_urgent, notes, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( UUID(), #{userId}, #{scheduleId}, #{appointmentType}, #{consultationMode}, #{location}, #{appointmentStatus}, #{isUrgent}, #{notes}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT schedule_id, counselor_id, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, slot_duration, available_slots, schedule_type from counselor_schedule

SELECT -- 用户基本信息 u.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, u.gender, u.avatar_url, u.account_status, -- 咨询师扩展信息 ci.title, ci.qualification_level, ci.education_background, ci.graduation_school, ci.major_field, ci.counseling_approach, ci.expertise_areas, ci.work_experience_years, ci.is_full_time, ci.counselor_status FROM user u JOIN counselor_info ci ON u.user_id = ci.counselor_id WHERE u.account_status = 1 AND ci.counselor_status = 1 ORDER BY ci.created_at DESC -- 按咨询师创建时间降序排列

SELECT -- 用户基本信息 u.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, u.gender, u.avatar_url, u.account_status, -- 咨询师扩展信息 ci.counselor_id, ci.employee_number, ci.title, ci.qualification_level, ci.certificate_number, ci.certificate_image, ci.education_background, ci.graduation_school, ci.major_field, ci.counseling_approach, ci.expertise_areas, ci.introduction, ci.work_experience_years, ci.is_full_time, ci.counselor_status, ci.max_cases_per_week, ci.created_at AS counselor_created_at FROM counselor_info ci JOIN user u ON ci.counselor_id = u.user_id WHERE ci.counselor_id = #{counselorId}

SELECT cs.counselor_id, cs.schedule_date, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, cs.slot_duration, cs.available_slots, cs.status, cs.schedule_type, cs.reservation_location FROM counselor_schedule cs WHERE cs.counselor_id = #{counselorId} AND cs.status != 0 ORDER BY cs.schedule_date, cs.start_time

SELECT ca.appointment_id, ca.student_id, u.real_name as student_name, cs.counselor_id, cu.real_name as counselor_name, ca.schedule_id, DATE(cs.schedule_date) as appointment_date, CONCAT(cs.start_time, '-', cs.end_time) as appointment_time, ca.appointment_type, ca.consultation_mode, ca.location, ca.appointment_status, ca.cancellation_reason, ca.cancelled_by, ca.is_urgent, ca.notes, ca.created_at, ca.updated_at FROM consultation_appointment ca LEFT JOIN counselor_schedule cs ON ca.schedule_id = cs.schedule_id LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.student_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN counselor_info ci ON cs.counselor_id = ci.counselor_id LEFT JOIN user cu ON ci.counselor_id = cu.user_id WHERE ca.appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE consultation_appointment SET appointment_status = #{status},
cancellation_reason = #{cancellationReason},
cancelled_by = #{cancelledBy},
updated_at = NOW() WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO counselor_schedule ( schedule_id, counselor_id, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, slot_duration, available_slots, schedule_type, status, reservation_location, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( UUID(), #{counselorId}, #{scheduleDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{slotDuration}, #{availableSlots}, #{scheduleType}, #{status}, #{reservationLocation}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
